name: banyandb-bydbql
description: Generate and execute read-only BanyanDB BydbQL for metrics, logs, and properties, and route SkyWalking traces and profiling to swctl.

interface.shortDescription: Run BydbQL and route traces to swctl.
interface.longDescription: Translate natural language into read-only BanyanDB BydbQL for metrics, logs, and properties. Route SkyWalking trace and profiling requests to swctl against OAP GraphQL with concrete command guidance.
defaultPrompt: Generate a BydbQL query for recent BanyanDB metrics.
List SkyWalking traces from the last week with swctl.
